pages.name: Dashboard
pages.description: Overview page showing key scheduling metrics, employee hour summaries, and shift status at a glance.
key_components: Color-coded status indicators (green/yellow/red for hours and shift capacity)

pages.name: Weekly Schedule
pages.description: Spreadsheet-like weekly grid where shifts are displayed as cells containing assigned employees, worker counts, and remaining capacity.
key_components: Weekly table grid (days as rows, shift types as columns)
Shift cells showing employee names, worker count, and remaining capacity
Color-coded shift availability (green=available, yellow=nearly full, red=full)

pages.name: Employee Management
pages.description: Page for managers to create, edit, and view employees, their employment types, and hour limits.
key_components: Employee type configuration (name, max weekly hours)
Live hour tracking per employee (max hours, scheduled hours, remaining hours)

pages.name: Settings
pages.description: Configuration page for managing predefined shifts, shift capacity rules, employee types, and system-wide settings.
key_components: Predefined shift management (day, start time, end time, min/max workers)
Employee type management (name, max weekly hours)

entities.name: Employee
entities.description: A worker at the recreation center who can be assigned to shifts.

entities.name: EmployeeType
entities.description: Classification of employee determining their maximum weekly hours (e.g., Permanent, Part-Time, Federal Work Study).

entities.name: Shift
entities.description: A predefined time slot on a specific day of the week with capacity limits.

entities.name: ScheduleAssignment
entities.description: A record linking an employee to a specific shift, representing that the employee is scheduled to work that shift.

entities.name: EmployeeAvailability
entities.description: Defines which shifts an employee is available to work (optional but recommended feature).

entities.name: User
entities.description: An authenticated user of the system with a role of either Employee or Manager.

operations.name: create_employee
operations.description: Manager creates a new employee with a name and employment type.
effects: New employee record is created in the system

operations.name: edit_employee
operations.description: Manager edits an existing employee's details such as name or employment type.
effects: Employee record is updated
Weekly hour limits may change if type changes

operations.name: configure_employee_type
operations.description: Manager creates or updates an employee type with name and max weekly hours.
effects: Employee type is created or updated
All employees of this type have their limits updated

operations.name: define_shift
operations.description: Manager creates or edits a predefined shift with day, times, and capacity limits.
effects: Shift is created or updated
Duration is automatically calculated

operations.name: assign_employee_to_shift
operations.description: Assign an employee to a specific shift for a given week. System validates hour limits and shift capacity before allowing assignment.
effects: Schedule assignment record is created
Employee weekly scheduled hours increase by shift duration
Shift assigned worker count increases by 1

operations.name: remove_employee_from_shift
operations.description: Remove an employee from a shift assignment. System automatically subtracts hours from employee total.
effects: Schedule assignment record is deleted
Employee weekly scheduled hours decrease by shift duration
Shift assigned worker count decreases by 1

operations.name: select_available_shift
operations.description: Employee selects an available shift for themselves, subject to the same validation rules.
effects: Schedule assignment record is created for the logged-in employee
Employee weekly scheduled hours increase by shift duration
Shift assigned worker count increases by 1

operations.name: set_employee_availability
operations.description: Employee or manager defines which shifts an employee is available to work.
effects: Availability record is created or updated
Unavailable shifts become disabled for the employee

operations.name: view_schedule
operations.description: Any authenticated user views the weekly shift schedule.
effects: Schedule data is retrieved and displayed

operations.name: view_personal_hours
operations.description: Employee views their own scheduled hours, max hours, and remaining hours.
effects: Personal hour summary is displayed

computed_metrics.name: shift_duration
computed_metrics.description: Automatically calculated duration of a shift: end_time minus start_time in hours.

computed_metrics.name: employee_weekly_hours
computed_metrics.description: Sum of duration_hours of all shifts assigned to an employee in a given week.

computed_metrics.name: employee_remaining_hours
computed_metrics.description: Employee's max weekly hours minus their currently scheduled weekly hours.

computed_metrics.name: shift_worker_count
computed_metrics.description: Count of employees currently assigned to a specific shift in a given week.

computed_metrics.name: shift_capacity_status
computed_metrics.description: Visual status of a shift: green (available), yellow (nearly full), red (full), based on assigned workers vs max workers.

computed_metrics.name: employee_hours_status
computed_metrics.description: Visual indicator for employee hours: green (under limit), yellow (close to limit), red (at or over limit).

computed_metrics.name: shift_remaining_capacity
computed_metrics.description: Number of additional workers that can be assigned to a shift (max_workers minus assigned_worker_count).

user_flows.name: Manager assigns employee to shift
steps: Manager navigates to Weekly Schedule page
Manager selects a shift cell (day + time slot)
Manager selects an employee from available employee list
System validates employee weekly hour limit would not be exceeded
System validates shift max worker capacity is not reached
System checks employee availability if configured
If valid, assignment is created and schedule updates in real time
If invalid, system blocks action and/or displays warning message
Employee hours summary and shift capacity indicators update immediately

user_flows.name: Manager removes employee from shift
steps: Manager navigates to Weekly Schedule page
Manager clicks on an assigned employee in a shift cell
Manager selects remove/unassign action
System deletes the schedule assignment
Employee weekly hours are automatically decremented
Shift worker count and capacity indicators update immediately

user_flows.name: Manager creates a new employee
steps: Manager navigates to Employee Management page
Manager clicks add employee
Manager enters employee name and selects employment type
System creates the employee record
Employee appears in the employee list with max hours from their type

user_flows.name: Manager configures employee types and shifts
steps: Manager navigates to Settings page
Manager creates or edits employee types with max weekly hours
Manager creates or edits predefined shifts with day, times, and capacity
System auto-calculates shift durations
Settings are saved and reflected across the application

user_flows.name: Employee views schedule and personal hours
steps: Employee logs in and is directed to Dashboard
Employee sees personal hour summary (max, scheduled, remaining)
Employee navigates to Weekly Schedule to view the full week grid
Employee sees all shift assignments and their own shifts highlighted
Employee can select available shifts for themselves

user_flows.name: Employee selects an available shift
steps: Employee navigates to Weekly Schedule page
Employee identifies available shifts (green indicators)
Employee clicks on an available shift to self-assign
System validates hour limit and shift capacity
If valid, employee is assigned and schedule updates
If invalid, system blocks action or shows warning

user_flows.name: Set employee availability
steps: Manager navigates to Employee Management page
Manager selects an employee
Manager configures available days and shifts for the employee
Unavailable shifts are disabled/greyed out on the Weekly Schedule for that employee

business_rules.rule: If assigning a shift would cause an employee's total weekly scheduled hours to exceed their employment type's max weekly hours, the assignment must be blocked or a warning displayed.
If a shift has reached its max_workers capacity, no additional employees may be assigned to that shift.
Shift duration is always automatically calculated as end_time minus start_time; it is never manually entered.
When an employee is removed from a shift, their weekly scheduled hours must be automatically decremented by the shift's duration.
When an employee is assigned to a shift, their weekly scheduled hours must be automatically incremented by the shift's duration.
Each shift must have a defined minimum and maximum number of workers.
Shifts are predefined by managers and cannot be manually created by employees.
Permanent employees have a max of 40 weekly hours, Part-Time employees have a max of 20 weekly hours, and Federal Work Study employees have a max of 20 weekly hours (configurable by manager).
Employees can only view the schedule and select available shifts; they cannot modify employee rules, types, or shift definitions.
Managers can create employees, set employee types, define hour limits, approve schedules, and edit shifts.
If employee availability is configured, shifts the employee is not available for should be disabled/prevented from assignment.
All hour summaries and shift capacity indicators must update in real time when assignments are added or removed.
